class.name: ARLightEstimate
class.brief_description: Lighting information estimated from the current AR frame.
class.description: Provides ambient and directional lighting values extracted from the current frame. Use these values to better match virtual content to the real scene. Directional light data is only present when the platform exposes it; otherwise those fields remain zero or empty.

method.name: is_directional
method.description: Returns [code]true[/code] when directional light information is available in addition to ambient lighting.

members.member: Estimated ambient color temperature in Kelvin.
Direction of the dominant light source when directional lighting is available.
Intensity of the dominant light source when directional lighting is available.
Spherical harmonics coefficients describing ambient scene lighting.
